==Cyclops Moon==
{| class="wikitable"
!Pedestal
!colspan="2"|Task
!Rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Left
|Explore Domain
|Explore Farms; Mines; Capital City
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Right
|Clear Domain
|Clear Farms; Mines; Capital City
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Back-Middle
|Cyclops God
|Defeat Cyclops Priest; Cyclops Head
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +2
|}

===Moon Shop===
{|class="wikitable"
!Item
!Cost
!Quantity Available
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +300}}
|1||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Order Chest, +100|yellow}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Chaos Chest, +100|red}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Divine Neutral Chest, +100|green}}
|2||1
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}
|3||1
|}

==Cyclops' Shop==
{| class="wikitable"
!Product
!Cost
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}
|100k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +200}}
|80k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Toner, +100}}
|72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|50k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +3h}}
|20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Offering Speedup, +3h}}
|20k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|}



==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Minion Battle
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|-
|Store
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!Tile
!Name
!Notes
!Rewards
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,500,000<br>1 Tile up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Entrace Sign
|Split the Sign
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +500}}
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,530,000<br>Two Tiles up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,550,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile left up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Oculist
|RUSH Power: 1,5800,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile left up, 1 Tile left down from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Medical Safe
|Enter the {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 1395
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest, +50}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,610,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Farmer
|RUSH Power: 1,710,000<br>2 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 1 Tile right down from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Grain Warehouse
|Empty the warehouse
|{{RewardIcon|Wonder Fungus Blue ATK}}{{Retext|ATK-Fungus|blue}} +3<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Fungus Chest, 100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Miner
|RUSH Power: 1,710,000<br>2 Tile up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|The Last Miner
|ATK: 21.189, DEF: 14.126, HP: 303.165, RUSH: AFFCT 47.500<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Pickaxe, +2|orange}}
|-
| No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,760,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile left up, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile left up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Map|green}} Fragment +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Shopkeeper
|RUSH Power: 1,660,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)"|Cyclops Shopkeeper
|Opens Cyclops Shop
|
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,790,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,630,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 2 Tile up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Winery Owner
|RUSH Power: 1,680,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 3 Tile up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Sealed Cellar
|Break in the cellar
|{{RewardIconWithText|Purple Reagent, +50|purple}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Refine Speedup, +3h}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Tiller
|RUSH Power: 1,820,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 1 Tile up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|General Xiahou Y.
|RUSH Power: 1,820,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Map|green}} Fragment +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|General of Gatekeeper
|ATK: 30.450, DEF: 20.300, HP: 540.420, RUSH: AFFCT 56.600<br>Special stats: HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Infrared Eye|purple}}<br>{{RewardIcon|8h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of General Xiahou Y.|green}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (1395)<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Tattered Temple
|Runmage<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}<br>{{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of Cyclops|green}}
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Tattered Temple
|Runmage<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tile up left from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}<br>{{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of Cyclops|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Researcher
|RUSH Power:1,890,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tile up left, 1 Tile up from Rocket<br>Unlocks Will's Subject
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Map|green}} Fragment +1
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|Will's Subject
|Clear 15 trials, per trial: {{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +30}} 
|Total:{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +620}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Alveolus of Gaia, +1|red}}<br>Neurolink +2<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Moon}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Tattered Temple
|Rummage<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}<br>{{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of Cyclops|green}}
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Firefighter
|RUSH Power: 1,840,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tiles up right from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Incomplete Species Sequence|green}} +1
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Tattered Temple
|Rummage<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tiles up right, 1 Tile up from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}<br>{{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of Cyclops|green}}
|-
|No number
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|Tattered Temple
|Rummage<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tiles up right, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up left from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +50k}}<br>{{RewardIcon|4h Soul Green}}{{Retext|Soul of Cyclops|green}}
|-
|rowspan="2"|No number
|style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)"|Cyclops Priest
|RUSH Power: 1,920,000<br>2 Tiles up, 1 Tile up left, 1 Tile up, 1 Tile up right, 2 Tiles up, 2 Tiles up right, 1 Tile up, 2 Tiles up left from Rocket
|{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops Map|green}} Fragment +2
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|God's Legacy
|Pick up the head
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Evolution Chest, +100}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Savant Eye, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Cyclops God Gene Segment, +5}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Cyclops God Head|green}}
|-
|}

[[Category:Cyclops Domain]]
[[Category:Species Domain]]
